# Analytics Setup: Nookstead
*Generated by Data Scientist Agent - Game Studio Sub-Agents v1.0*

## Project Analytics Framework
**Project**: Nookstead
**Engine**: Phaser.js 3 + Next.js 16 + Colyseus
**Platform**: Web (Desktop and Mobile browsers)
**Setup Date**: 2026-02-13
**Data Scientist**: Data Scientist Agent

## Core Metrics Framework

### Player Engagement Metrics
| Metric | Definition | Target Value | Collection Method | Frequency |
|--------|------------|--------------|-------------------|-----------|
| Session Length | Average time per play session | 25-40 minutes | Automatic (session_start/end) | Real-time |
| Sessions per User | Daily sessions per active player | 1.5-2 sessions | Automatic | Daily |
| Retention Rate (Day 1) | % players returning after 1 day | 50% | Cohort Analysis | Daily |
| Retention Rate (Day 7) | % players returning after 7 days | 25% | Cohort Analysis | Weekly |
| Retention Rate (Day 30) | % players returning after 30 days | 15% | Cohort Analysis | Monthly |
| NPC Dialogue Rate | % sessions with at least 1 NPC dialogue | > 80% | Event Tracking | Real-time |
| Dialogue Depth | Average turns per NPC conversation | 4-6 turns | Event Tracking | Daily |
| DAU/MAU Ratio | Daily active / Monthly active ratio | 30% | Calculated | Daily |

### Performance Metrics
| Metric | Definition | Target Value | Alert Threshold | Monitoring |
|--------|------------|--------------|-----------------|------------|
| Frame Rate (Desktop) | Average FPS during gameplay | 60 FPS | < 45 FPS | Continuous |
| Frame Rate (Mobile) | Average FPS during gameplay | 30 FPS | < 20 FPS | Continuous |
| Page Load Time (Desktop) | Time to interactive game state | < 3 seconds | > 5 seconds | Per Session |
| Page Load Time (Mobile) | Time to interactive game state | < 5 seconds | > 8 seconds | Per Session |
| NPC Dialogue Latency | LLM response time (end-to-end) | < 3 seconds | > 5 seconds | Per Dialogue |
| WebSocket Latency | Round-trip time for position updates | < 150 ms | > 300 ms | Continuous |
| Crash Rate | % sessions ending in error | < 1% | > 2% | Real-time |
| Memory Usage (Desktop) | Peak JS heap size | < 512 MB | > 768 MB | Continuous |
| Memory Usage (Mobile) | Peak JS heap size | < 256 MB | > 384 MB | Continuous |

### AI Cost Metrics (Critical for Nookstead)
| Metric | Definition | Target Value | Alert Threshold | Monitoring |
|--------|------------|--------------|-----------------|------------|
| Cost per Dialogue | LLM API cost per NPC conversation | < $0.005 | > $0.01 | Per Dialogue |
| Cost per Player-Hour | Total LLM cost per player per hour | < $0.03 | > $0.05 | Hourly |
| Cost per Reflection Batch | LLM cost for all NPC daily reflections | < $0.10 | > $0.20 | Per Game-Day |
| Cache Hit Rate | % of NPC responses served from cache | > 30% | < 15% | Real-time |
| Haiku vs Sonnet Ratio | % of calls using cheaper Haiku model | > 60% | < 40% | Daily |
| Token Usage per Dialogue | Average input+output tokens per NPC response | < 2000 | > 3500 | Per Dialogue |

### Business Metrics
| Metric | Definition | Target Value | Collection Method | Frequency |
|--------|------------|--------------|-------------------|-----------|
| Registered Accounts | Total accounts created | 50K Year 1 | Registration Event | Real-time |
| MAU | Monthly Active Users | 50K Year 1 | Session Tracking | Monthly |
| Conversion Rate | % users making first purchase | 3-5% | Purchase Tracking | Weekly |
| ARPU | Average Revenue Per User | $0.30-0.50/month | Revenue Analysis | Monthly |
| ARPPU | Average Revenue Per Paying User | $8-12/month | Revenue Analysis | Monthly |
| LTV | Lifetime Value per User | $15-30 | Cohort Analysis | Monthly |
| AI Cost / Revenue Ratio | LLM costs as % of revenue per paying user | < 15% | Calculated | Monthly |

## Telemetry Events

### Session Events
```json
{
  "event_category": "session",
  "events": [
    {
      "event_name": "session_start",
      "description": "Player connects to game and enters world",
      "parameters": {
        "session_id": "string (UUID)",
        "player_id": "string (UUID)",
        "server_name": "string",
        "platform": "string (desktop_chrome|desktop_firefox|mobile_chrome|mobile_safari)",
        "viewport_width": "integer",
        "viewport_height": "integer",
        "connection_type": "string (wifi|cellular|wired)"
      },
      "frequency": "once_per_session"
    },
    {
      "event_name": "session_end",
      "description": "Player disconnects from game",
      "parameters": {
        "session_id": "string",
        "duration_seconds": "integer",
        "zones_visited": "string[] (zone IDs)",
        "npcs_talked_to": "integer",
        "dialogues_total_turns": "integer",
        "exit_reason": "string (voluntary|timeout|error|tab_close)"
      },
      "frequency": "once_per_session"
    }
  ]
}
```

### NPC Interaction Events
```json
{
  "event_category": "npc_interaction",
  "events": [
    {
      "event_name": "npc_dialogue_start",
      "description": "Player initiates conversation with NPC",
      "parameters": {
        "session_id": "string",
        "player_id": "string",
        "npc_id": "string",
        "npc_name": "string",
        "location_zone": "string",
        "location_x": "integer",
        "location_y": "integer",
        "relationship_level": "string (stranger|acquaintance|friend|close_friend)",
        "npc_current_action": "string",
        "npc_emotion": "string"
      },
      "frequency": "per_conversation"
    },
    {
      "event_name": "npc_dialogue_turn",
      "description": "Single turn in NPC dialogue (player message + NPC response)",
      "parameters": {
        "session_id": "string",
        "dialogue_id": "string",
        "turn_number": "integer",
        "input_type": "string (quick_reply|free_text)",
        "player_message_length": "integer (characters)",
        "npc_response_length": "integer (characters)",
        "npc_emotion": "string (agree|disagree|neutral)",
        "llm_model": "string (haiku|sonnet)",
        "llm_latency_ms": "integer",
        "llm_input_tokens": "integer",
        "llm_output_tokens": "integer",
        "llm_cost_usd": "float",
        "memories_retrieved": "integer",
        "cache_hit": "boolean"
      },
      "frequency": "per_turn"
    },
    {
      "event_name": "npc_dialogue_end",
      "description": "Conversation with NPC ends",
      "parameters": {
        "session_id": "string",
        "dialogue_id": "string",
        "total_turns": "integer",
        "total_duration_seconds": "integer",
        "total_llm_cost_usd": "float",
        "end_reason": "string (limit_reached|player_left|npc_busy)",
        "player_satisfaction_signal": "string (optional, if we add rating)"
      },
      "frequency": "per_conversation"
    },
    {
      "event_name": "npc_reflection_generated",
      "description": "NPC generates daily reflections (system event)",
      "parameters": {
        "npc_id": "string",
        "server_id": "string",
        "game_day": "integer",
        "reflection_count": "integer",
        "memories_processed": "integer",
        "llm_model": "string",
        "llm_cost_usd": "float",
        "processing_time_ms": "integer"
      },
      "frequency": "once_per_game_day_per_npc"
    },
    {
      "event_name": "npc_plan_generated",
      "description": "NPC generates daily plan (system event)",
      "parameters": {
        "npc_id": "string",
        "server_id": "string",
        "game_day": "integer",
        "plan_items_count": "integer",
        "llm_model": "string",
        "llm_cost_usd": "float",
        "processing_time_ms": "integer"
      },
      "frequency": "once_per_game_day_per_npc"
    }
  ]
}
```

```json
    {

      "description": "Player performs farming activity on homestead",
      "parameters": {

        "action": "string (till|plant|water|harvest|feed)",
        "crop_type": "string (nullable)",
        "animal_type": "string (nullable)",
        "tool_used": "string",
        "tile_x": "integer",
        "tile_y": "integer",
        "season": "string"
      },
      "frequency": "per_action"
    },
    {
      "event_name": "market_transaction",
      "description": "Player buys or sells item at market or NPC shop",
      "parameters": {
        "player_id": "string",
        "transaction_type": "string (buy|sell)",
        "item_id": "string",
        "item_name": "string",
        "quantity": "integer",
        "price_per_unit": "integer",
        "total_price": "integer",
        "vendor_type": "string (npc|player_stall|bulletin_board)",
        "vendor_id": "string"
      },
      "frequency": "per_transaction"
    },
    {
      "event_name": "quest_event",
      "description": "Quest lifecycle events",
      "parameters": {
        "player_id": "string",
        "quest_id": "string",
        "quest_type": "string (structural|organic|bulletin)",
        "quest_giver_npc": "string",
        "action": "string (accepted|progress|completed|abandoned|failed)",
        "reward_coins": "integer (nullable)",
        "reward_reputation": "integer (nullable)"
      },
      "frequency": "per_event"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Performance Events
```json
{
  "event_category": "performance",
  "events": [

      "event_name": "performance_sample",
      "description": "Regular client performance metrics sample",
      "parameters": {
        "session_id": "string",

      },
      "frequency": "every_30_seconds"
    },
    {
      "event_name": "asset_load_time",
      "description": "Time to load game assets",
      "parameters": {
        "asset_type": "string (tilemap|spritesheet|audio|font)",
        "asset_name": "string",
        "load_duration_ms": "integer",
        "asset_size_bytes": "integer",
        "cache_hit": "boolean"
      },
      "frequency": "per_load"
    },
    {
      "event_name": "client_error",
      "description": "JavaScript error or unhandled exception",
      "parameters": {
        "session_id": "string",
        "error_type": "string",
        "error_message": "string",
        "stack_trace": "string (truncated to 500 chars)",
        "page_url": "string",
        "platform": "string"
      },
      "frequency": "per_error"
    }
  ]
}
```

## A/B Testing Framework

### Test Categories
1. **NPC Dialogue Quality**
   - Prompt template variations (system prompt structure)
   - Memory retrieval parameters (top-K, recency weight vs importance weight)
   - Dialogue turn limits (8 vs 10 vs 12 turns)
   - Quick reply generation strategies

2. **User Experience**
   - Dialogue window layout (side portrait vs top portrait vs full-screen mobile)
   - Input method default (quick replies first vs free text first)
   - Onboarding flow (guided tour vs free exploration)
   - HUD layout and information density

3. **Economy Balance**
   - Crop growth times
   - Market price coefficients
   - Starting resources
   - Reputation gain rates

4. **AI Cost Optimization**
   - Haiku vs Sonnet for different dialogue types
   - Context window size (fewer vs more memories in prompt)
   - Caching aggressiveness (greeting cache TTL)
   - Reflection batch frequency

### Statistical Framework
**Confidence Level**: 95%
**Minimum Effect Size**: 5% improvement on primary metric
**Minimum Sample Size**: 500 users per variant (Phase 0 prototype); 1000 at scale
**Test Duration**: Minimum 1 week (7 game-days of data), Maximum 4 weeks
**Early Stopping Rules**: Stop if p < 0.001 and practical significance confirmed; stop if sample exhausted

### A/B Test Implementation
```typescript
// Server-side A/B assignment (Colyseus room or AI service)
interface ABTest {
  testId: string;
  testName: string;
  hypothesis: string;
  variants: {
    variantId: string;      // 'control' | 'treatment_a' | 'treatment_b'
    description: string;
    trafficPercentage: number;
    config: Record<string, unknown>;  // Variant-specific parameters
  }[];
  primaryMetric: string;
  secondaryMetrics: string[];
  guardrailMetrics: string[];  // Must not degrade (retention, crash_rate)
  startDate: string;
  endDate: string;
  status: 'draft' | 'running' | 'analyzing' | 'completed';
}

// Assignment is deterministic per player_id + test_id (hash-based)
// Ensures consistent experience across sessions
```

## Phase 0 Analytics Implementation Plan

### Milestone 0.1 (Walking on Tiles) -- Minimal Analytics
- session_start / session_end events
- performance_sample (FPS, memory) every 30 seconds
- asset_load_time for tilemap and spritesheet loading
- client_error tracking
- **Dashboard**: FPS distribution, load time percentiles, error rate

### Milestone 0.2 (Multiplayer Sync) -- Add Network Analytics
- player_movement_sample (every 30s for heatmaps)
- WebSocket latency in performance_sample
- Player join/leave tracking
- **Dashboard**: Add latency distribution, concurrent player count, heatmap

### Milestone 0.3 (NPC Talks) -- Add AI Analytics (Critical)
- npc_dialogue_start / npc_dialogue_turn / npc_dialogue_end
- LLM latency, token usage, and cost per turn
- Cache hit rate tracking
- **Dashboard**: Add dialogue depth distribution, LLM cost waterfall, latency percentiles

### Milestone 0.4 (NPC Remembers) -- Full Analytics
- npc_reflection_generated / npc_plan_generated
- Memory retrieval metrics (count, relevance scores)
- Haiku vs Sonnet usage ratio
- Total cost per player-hour calculation
- **Dashboard**: Full cost dashboard, memory system metrics, per-NPC cost breakdown

## Data Storage and Pipeline

### Phase 0 Architecture (Simple)
```
Client (Phaser/Next.js)
  -> HTTP POST to AI Service / Game Server
    -> INSERT into PostgreSQL telemetry_events table
    -> Redis for real-time counters (active sessions, cost accumulators)

Dashboard: Simple Grafana or custom Next.js admin page reading from PostgreSQL
```

### Phase 1+ Architecture (Scaled)
```
Client -> Game Server -> Event Queue (BullMQ/Redis)
  -> Event Processor -> PostgreSQL (raw events)
  -> PostgreSQL -> dbt transformations -> Analytics tables
  -> Grafana / Metabase dashboards

Optional: Export to BigQuery/Snowflake for advanced analysis
```

## Data Privacy and Compliance

### Data Collection Principles
- **Minimal Collection**: Only collect data necessary for game improvement and LLM cost monitoring
- **User Consent**: Clear opt-in at account creation; privacy settings in game menu
- **Data Anonymization**: Player IDs are UUIDs; no real names, emails, or IPs stored in telemetry
- **Secure Storage**: PostgreSQL with encrypted connections; no telemetry data exposed to public APIs
- **Retention Policy**: Raw telemetry events retained for 90 days; aggregated metrics retained indefinitely

### Compliance Requirements
- [x] GDPR compliance: consent mechanism, data export (DSAR), deletion on request
- [x] CCPA compliance: "Do Not Sell" opt-out mechanism
- [ ] COPPA compliance: Not applicable (18+ target audience)
- [x] No PII in LLM context: Player free-text is sent to Claude API but not stored with identifying information
- [x] Transparent privacy policy on nookstead.land

### Special Consideration: LLM Data
Player messages sent to Claude API are subject to Anthropic's data usage policy. Nookstead must:
- Inform players that dialogue is processed by AI
- Not include player PII in LLM prompts (use pseudonymous player names)
- Not store raw LLM prompts/responses in telemetry (only metadata: latency, tokens, cost)
- Use Anthropic's zero-retention API option if available

## Dashboard and Reporting

### Real-Time Dashboard (Phase 0)
**Metrics Displayed**:
- Current active sessions (by server)
- Average FPS (desktop vs mobile)
- NPC dialogue latency (p50, p95, p99)
- LLM cost accumulator (today, this week, this month)
- Cache hit rate (rolling 1-hour window)
- Error rate (rolling 1-hour window)

### Weekly Report (Phase 0)
**Content**:
1. Session metrics: total sessions, unique players, avg session length
2. NPC interaction: dialogues per session, avg turns, most-talked-to NPC
3. Performance: FPS distribution, load times, error rate
4. AI costs: total spend, cost per dialogue, cost per player-hour, cache hit rate
5. Issues and blockers: top errors, performance regressions
6. Recommendations: tuning suggestions, cost optimization opportunities

## Success Criteria

### Phase 0 Analytics Success
- [x] All core telemetry events firing correctly (validated per milestone)
- [ ] Real-time dashboard operational (by M0.3)
- [ ] LLM cost tracking accurate to within 5% of actual API billing
- [ ] Performance monitoring catching regressions before they reach players
- [ ] A/B testing framework operational (by M0.4)

### Data Quality Targets
- **Event completeness**: > 99% of sessions have both start and end events
- **Latency of data**: < 5 seconds from event to dashboard visibility
- **LLM cost accuracy**: Within 5% of actual Anthropic billing
- **No PII leakage**: Zero instances of real user data in telemetry logs
